metadata.title: Wan 2.5 - AI Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Wan 2.5 by Alibaba. Cinematic AI video generation supporting text-to-video and image-to-video with native audio synchronization. Multiple resolutions and aspect ratios available.

hero.title: Wan 2.5
hero.description: Alibaba's cinematic AI video generation model. Create videos with native audio synchronization for dialogue, ambient sound, and background music.

introduce.title: About Wan 2.5
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Wan 2.5 API from Alibaba is designed for cinematic AI video generation, supporting both text-to-video and image-to-video. It natively synchronizes visuals with dialogue, ambient sound, and background music with multiple resolutions and aspect ratios.

items.title: Native Audio Sync
items.description: Synchronize visuals with dialogue, ambient sound, and background music.

items.title: Multiple Resolutions
items.description: Support for 720p and 1080p resolutions for different use cases.

items.title: Flexible Aspect Ratios
items.description: Support for 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 aspect ratios.

items.title: Cinematic Quality
items.description: Professional-grade cinematic video output.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Wan 2.5 a leading AI video generation model.

items.title: Text To Video
items.description: Generate stunning videos from text descriptions with cinematic quality.

items.title: Image To Video
items.description: Transform static images into dynamic video content with natural motion.

items.title: Video To Video
items.description: Edit and transform existing videos with AI-powered enhancement.

items.title: Audio Generation
items.description: Generate synchronized audio including dialogue and ambient sounds.

items.title: Multi-Resolution
items.description: Output in 720p or 1080p resolution based on needs.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated videos.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Wan 2.5.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Create content in multiple aspect ratios for different platforms.

items.title: Marketing Videos
items.description: Produce engaging marketing content with synchronized audio.

items.title: Advertising
items.description: Create advertising content with cinematic quality.

items.title: Creative Storytelling
items.description: Bring stories to life with synchronized audio and visuals.

items.title: Music Videos
items.description: Create music videos with synchronized audio and visuals.

items.title: Educational Content
items.description: Produce engaging educational videos with clear narration.

items.title: What is Wan 2.5?
items.description: Wan 2.5 is Alibaba's cinematic AI video generation model with native audio synchronization.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Wan 2.5 supports Text To Video (T2V) and Image To Video (I2V) generation modes.

items.title: Who created Wan 2.5?
items.description: Wan 2.5 is created by Alibaba, a leading technology company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Wan 2.5 excels at native audio synchronization and flexible output options.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos generated with Wan 2.5 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What resolutions does it support?
items.description: Wan 2.5 supports 720p and 1080p resolutions with 16:9, 9:16, and 1:1 aspect ratios.

cta.title: Ready to Try Wan 2.5?
cta.description: Experience Alibaba's cinematic AI video generation. Create videos with native audio sync.
